payload.label: faucet
payload.long_description: Partial chrome-plated faucet spout visible at the right edge of the crop; cylindrical, curved neck with reflective surface and small specular highlights, set against a beige tiled background and appearing wall-mounted and close to the camera (approx. 0.4 m).
